data.narrative:
AbCellera is a public-stage biotech & health company valued through comparison to a peer set of four same-sector, same-stage companies: Tempus AI ($6.0B), Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M). The broader comp universe spans 3 public tickers and 8 private peers in the sector.

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. The median valuation across the four public-stage biotech peers is $2.2B, with a range spanning $529M to $6.0B. This method was selected given the target's stage and sector alignment with the comparable set. A revenue-based public-comp anchoring approach using the sector median P/S of 5.8x across three public tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) could not be applied, as the target's revenue figures are not on file.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.9B to $2.5B, centered on a median of $2.2B. This range reflects the interquartile positioning within the peer set. Key uncertainties include the wide dispersion among peers—a 11x spread from floor to ceiling—and the absence of revenue visibility, which limits application of market multiple methods. The relative valuations of Tempus AI and Alto Neuroscience suggest stage-adjusted heterogeneity in the biotech & health public market; additional operational or revenue data would refine this band.
